args: set -euo pipefail; if command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then PNPM='corepack pnpm'; elif command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then PNPM='pnpm'; else echo 'maitredb Copilot plugin requires pnpm or corepack to bootstrap from source.' >&2; exit 127; fi; if [ ! -d node_modules ] || [ ! -f packages/mcp/dist/index.js ]; then $PNPM install --frozen-lockfile; $PNPM --filter @maitredb/mcp build; fi; exec node packages/mcp/dist/index.js
